description: BotLens TypedDelta observability — throughput, payload size, emission timing, filtered viewers, resyncs, and replay-buffer signals for live selected-symbol BotLens updates.

panels.title: TypedDelta Events
panels.description: Total emitted symbol TypedDelta events in the selected time window.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT item FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') ) SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM base;

panels.title: Resync Events
panels.description: Count of BotLens typed-delta continuity invalidations that emitted resync-required.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(COALESCE(NULLIF(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->>'resync_required_count','')::double precision, 0.0)), 0.0)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->>'symbol_key','') = '${symbol_key:raw}');

panels.title: Avg Payload Bytes
panels.description: Average typed-delta payload size in bytes.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT NULLIF(item->>'payload_bytes','')::double precision AS payload_bytes FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') ) SELECT round(avg(payload_bytes)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM base;

panels.title: Emit p95 (ms)
panels.description: p95 typed-delta emission time from BotLens run-stream fanout.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT NULLIF(item->>'emit_ms','')::double precision AS emit_ms FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') ) SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY emit_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base;

panels.title: TypedDelta Traffic by Type
panels.description: Delta event volume over time, broken out by typed-delta lane.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(e.known_at, $__interval), item->>'type' AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Top Symbols by TypedDelta Volume
panels.description: Which symbols dominate BotLens typed-delta traffic in the selected window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT item->>'symbol_key' AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.title: Payload Bytes p95 by Type
panels.description: p95 payload bytes over time for each typed-delta lane.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(e.known_at, $__interval), item->>'type' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(item->>'payload_bytes','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Build / Emit Latency Quantiles
panels.description: Packaging and fanout timing for typed-delta construction and stream emission.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT e.known_at, NULLIF(item->>'build_ms','')::double precision AS build_ms, NULLIF(item->>'emit_ms','')::double precision AS emit_ms FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') ) SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(known_at, $__interval), 'build_p50' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY build_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(known_at, $__interval), 'build_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY build_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(known_at, $__interval), 'emit_p50' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY emit_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(known_at, $__interval), 'emit_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY emit_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(known_at, $__interval), 'emit_p99' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY emit_ms)::double precision AS value FROM base GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Filtered Viewers / Resyncs
panels.description: Filtered typed-delta deliveries and continuity invalidation rate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(e.known_at, $__interval), 'filtered_viewers' AS metric, sum(NULLIF(item->>'filtered_viewer_count','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(e.known_at, $__interval), COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->>'resync_reason', 'resync_required') AS metric, sum(COALESCE(NULLIF(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->>'resync_required_count','')::double precision, 0.0))::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->>'symbol_key','') = '${symbol_key:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Delta Mix by Run / Symbol / Type
panels.description: Which runs, symbols, and delta types dominate traffic, payload size, and emit latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.run_id, item->>'symbol_key' AS symbol_key, item->>'type' AS delta_type, count(*) AS delta_events, round(avg(NULLIF(item->>'payload_bytes','')::numeric), 2) AS avg_payload_bytes, round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(item->>'emit_ms','')::double precision)::numeric, 3) AS p95_emit_ms FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE $__timeFilter(e.known_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol_key:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'symbol_key' = '${symbol_key:raw}') AND ('${delta_type:raw}' = '__all' OR item->>'type' = '${delta_type:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY delta_events DESC, p95_emit_ms DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Symbol Snapshot Handoff
panels.description: From Loki: server-side symbol snapshot deliveries and queued delta replay during hydration.

panels.title: Symbol Snapshot Logs
panels.description: From Loki: server-side symbol snapshot delivery and overflow log lines for the selected run.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT run_id || ' (' || to_char(max(known_at), 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY max(known_at) DESC LIMIT 100;
list.query: SELECT run_id || ' (' || to_char(max(known_at), 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY max(known_at) DESC LIMIT 100;

list.name: symbol_key
list.label: Symbol Key
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT item->>'symbol_key' AS __value, item->>'symbol_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND item->>'symbol_key' <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT item->>'symbol_key' AS __value, item->>'symbol_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND item->>'symbol_key' <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: delta_type
list.label: Delta Type
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT item->>'type' AS __value, item->>'type' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND item->>'type' <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT item->>'type' AS __value, item->>'type' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(e.payload->'typed_delta_metrics'->'events', '[]'::jsonb)) item WHERE ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR e.run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND item->>'type' <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: BotLens TypedDelta Observability
